description_long: This is a pair of over-ear headphones with a striking orange and black color scheme, featuring a sturdy, padded headband and large, cushioned ear cups. The ear cups are circular and prominently display a blue paw print logo on the exterior, adding a playful and distinctive touch. The headphones have a visible wired connection, with the cable emerging from the left ear cup, suggesting a traditional analog audio interface. The headband is reinforced with dual black bands for added durability and comfort, and the ear cups appear to be adjustable to fit various head sizes. The materials suggest a combination of hard plastic for the frame, synthetic leather or foam for the ear pads, and metal reinforcements within the headband. This object is designed for personal audio use and is suitable for urban environments such as streets, parks, or public transportation.
description: A pair of orange and black over-ear headphones with a blue paw print logo, cushioned ear pads, and a wired connection. The design is robust and visually distinctive, suitable for personal audio use.
description_view_0: Side view showing the left ear cup with a blue paw print logo and the attached audio cable.
description_view_1: Front view displaying both large, cushioned ear cups and the dual-banded headband.
description_view_2: Side view of the right ear cup, also featuring the blue paw print logo and a visible cable.
description_view_3: Rear view highlighting the headband structure and the symmetrical design of the ear cups.
